about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: Discover the essence of ALL SHE NEEDS
about.story_p1: Founded with a passion for quality and an eye for elegance, ALL SHE NEEDS is more than just a store. It is a destination for the modern woman who values both style and substance.
about.story_p2: We believe that the items you surround yourself with should be as extraordinary as you are. That's why we meticulously curate every piece in our collection, ensuring it meets our high standards of craftsmanship and design.
about.mission_text: To empower women by providing high-quality essentials that inspire confidence and elevate everyday living.
about.quality_text: We source only the finest materials and work with skilled artisans.
about.curation_text: Every product is handpicked to ensure it aligns with our aesthetic.
about.customer_first_text: Your satisfaction is our top priority, from browsing to unboxing.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about shopping with us.
faq.payment_q: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.payment_a: Currently, we specialize in Cash on Delivery (COD) to ensure a safe and trustworthy shopping experience.
faq.order_a: Yes, once your order is processed, you will receive a confirmation with tracking details.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to ALL SHE NEEDS. By using our website, you agree to the following terms and conditions.
terms.section1_text: You must be at least 18 years old to use this site or have parental consent.
terms.section2_text: We strive for accuracy, but we do not warrant that product descriptions or other content are error-free.
terms.section3_text: All prices are in EGP. We reserve the right to change prices at any time. We currently offer Cash on Delivery.
terms.section4_text: All content on this site is the property of ALL SHE NEEDS and protected by copyright laws.
terms.section5_text: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at support@allsheneeds.com.
